description: Deadly explosions in western Ukraine investigated as ‘terrorist attack’ Pakistan launches airstrikes against Afghan-based ‘militants’ it blames for cross-border attacks Middle East states condemn US ambassador’s  comments appearing to support ‘expansionist’ Israel Iranian students hold protests as new university term begins Venezuela passed a law to free hundreds of political prisoners after US pressure. title: Climber accused of leaving girlfriend to die on Austria’s tallest mountain goes on trial
description: A man accused of leaving his girlfriend to freeze to death on Austria’s tallest mountain went on trial on Thursday in a case that could have major implications for mountain climbers and how liable they are for the safety of companions.
